arts.ttl: Ranieri told Maresca not to forget his Leicester sacking
arts.sum: Chelsea manager Enzo Maresca admitted he was reminded of the ruthlessness of the footballing world...

arts.ttl: Southampton statistic highlights Premier League woes ahead of Leicester City visit
arts.sum: Southampton are aiming to end a 20-game winless streak in the Premier League when fellow strugglers Leicester City visit St Mary's Stadium on Saturday afternoon.

arts.ttl: EXCLUSIVE: Chelsea defender Chilwell open to Leicester return
arts.sum: EXCLUSIVE: Chelsea defender Chilwell open to Leicester return However, no suitors emerged and despite being omitted from Chelsea’s matchday squad for the opening stages of the new campaign, Chilwell was still a Blues player when the summer window slammed shut.

arts.ttl: Danny Simpson makes Leicester City transfer request in Nottingham Forest comparison
arts.sum: But while there were too many signings at the City Ground, Simpson believes Cooper needs a couple more in the new year to add to the nine from the summer and leave the club with a squad he can guide up the Premier League table. Two more signings in the January transfer window would set Steve Cooper up to be successful at Leicester City, title-winner Danny Simpson believes.
